findings.title: Design README fixture catalog counts are stale
evidence: verify_evidence.py PASS with executable_invalid_cases=34, documentary_only_cases=1, residual_risks=8
README claims 29 executable invalid vectors and 6 documentary-only scenarios
counterevidence: Executable evidence gate itself is consistent with EXPECTED.json; only README prose drifts
findings.falsifier: README counts match EXPECTED.json and evidence gate output
findings.repair: Update README catalog counts to 34 executable / 1 documentary / 8 residual (or generate from EXPECTED)

findings.title: Rejection-code taxonomy looser than fixture attack names
counterevidence: Evidence gate still rejects all executable invalid fixtures fail-closed
findings.falsifier: Fixture expected codes match attack-class-specific rejection codes
findings.repair: Prefer specific codes; document intentional overloads

findings.title: Full lab tests and nexus verify fail without @noble/ed25519
evidence: unittest discover -s tests: 9 failures + 2 errors, ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND @noble/ed25519
counterevidence: All Beneficial Genesis package suites prescribed by this audit passed without Noble
findings.falsifier: Documented npm install or vendored noble makes full suite and nexus verify pass
findings.repair: Document and pin Node dependency for independent verifiers

findings.title: Economics SCHEMES registry omits lottery
evidence: SCHEMES lacks random_lottery_component; lottery requires rng argument
counterevidence: Scenario runner and direct tests cover lottery
findings.falsifier: Registry includes lottery with explicit rng factory contract

findings.title: Residual research risks correctly disclosed and not closed by tests
evidence: Synthetic crypto, no real Bitcoin consensus, FC4 pathway, FC6 Sybil without identity, ECONOMIC_GATE_PASS false
findings.falsifier: Production Bitcoin+PQ+identity layers with independent economic gate pass evidence
findings.repair: None required for honesty; continue research tracks B/C/D/E/F per issue #33
